governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) + RetrieveHistory (read); users (read) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) - note: parent requires only read on users, but ValidateAndExecuteSend performs write to update last_seen, which is acceptable as it extends the required operation; channels (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (read) + CreateChannel (read_write) + JoinChannel (read_write).
